description_long: This is a modern, tactical rifle with a distinctive bullpup configuration, featuring a matte black finish and angular, geometric design. The rifle has a prominent pistol grip and a secondary vertical foregrip for enhanced control. Its magazine is a detachable box type, partially transparent to reveal brass-colored cartridges inside. The barrel is long and slender, extending from the compact body, and the stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, forming a continuous line with the receiver. The rifle is equipped with basic iron sights and lacks any visible muzzle device at the barrel's end.
description: A matte black bullpup rifle with a detachable box magazine, pistol and foregrip, and a long, slender barrel. The design is angular and modern, with visible iron sights and a transparent magazine window.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen at an angle, highlighting the pistol grip, vertical foregrip, transparent magazine, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_1: A direct side profile showing the rifle's slim width, with the barrel and stock aligned and minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0 but from the opposite side, showing the other side of the magazine and the angular structure of the stock and grips.
description_view_3: A direct side profile from the opposite side of view 1, again emphasizing the rifle's narrow profile and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
